news.title: 複数のPCからリソースをかき集めて巨大なAIモデルをローカル実行できる「mesh-llm」
news.description: Mesh LLMは、複数のコンピューターの余剰GPU計算資源を持ち寄り、1台では動かしにくい大規模言語モデルを分散実行できるようにする仕組みです。OpenAI互換APIを備えており、既存のAIツールやエージェントからそのまま使いやすい点が特徴です。mesh-llm - Decentralised LLM Inferencehttps://docs.anarchai.org/michaelneale/mesh-llm: reference impl with llama.cpp compiled to distri…

news.title: Emotion concepts and their function in a large language model | Anthropic
news.description: All modern language models sometimes act like they have emotions. They may say they’re happy to help you, or sorry when they make a mistake. Sometimes they even appear to become frustrated or anxious when struggling with tasks. What’s behind these behaviors? …

news.title: Crisis contractor for OpenAI, Anthropic eyes a move to combat extremism
news.description: People who show violent extremist tendencies on ChatGPT will be directed to human and chatbot‑based deradicalisation support through a new tool in development ​in New Zealand, the people behind it said.

news.title: Using Claude AI APIs in ASP.NET Core Applications (2026 Guide)
news.description: Integrate Claude AI with ASP.NET Core! This 2026 guide covers API integration, architecture, best practices, and code examples for building intelligent apps.

news.title: OpenAI brings ChatGPT’s Voice mode to CarPlay
news.description: In a surprise release, OpenAI has made ChatGPT’s Voice mode available through Apple CarPlay. If you’re running the latest version of both iOS and the ChatGPT app, and own a CarPlay-compatible vehicle, you can check out the experience. To get started, download…

news.title: Google is pushing AI video into ordinary life — just as OpenAI pulls Sora back
news.description: Google has launched its AI Plus subscription in 35 countries, including the U.S., bundling enhanced AI tools, cloud storage, and video generation features.

news.title: HP unveils its most powerful PC ever with up to four Nvidia Blackwell GPUs, and I love its bizarre user-inspired tool-free side panel

clusters.title: AI Technology Advancements
clusters.summary: The article discusses various advancements in AI technology, including decentralized inference of large language models using Mesh LLM, the availability of ChatGPT's voice mode on CarPlay, and partnerships aimed at optimizing ads for AI platforms.
